name: core-app
description: * Version: 1.9 [under development] * [Website](https://fuelphp.com/) * [Release Documentation](https://fuelphp.com/docs) * [Release API browser](https://fuelphp.com/api) * [Development branch Documentation](https://fuelphp.com/dev-docs) * [Development branch API browser](https://fuelphp.com/dev-api) * [Support Forum](https://forums.fuelphp.com) for comments, discussion and community support

scripts.copy-assets: xcopy /y node_modules\admin-lte\dist\css\adminlte.min.css public\assets\css\ && xcopy /y node_modules\admin-lte\dist\js\adminlte.min.js public\assets\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\jquery\dist\jquery.min.js public\assets\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\bootstrap\dist\js\bootstrap.bundle.min.js public\assets\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\bootstrap-icons\font\* public\assets\css\ && xcopy /y node_modules\@fortawesome\fontawesome-free\css\all.min.css public\assets\css\ && xcopy /y node_modules\@fortawesome\fontawesome-free\webfonts\* public\assets\webfonts\ && xcopy /y node_modules\datatables.net-bs4\js\dataTables.bootstrap4.min.js public\assets\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\datatables.net-bs4\css\dataTables.bootstrap4.min.css public\assets\css\ && xcopy /y node_modules\datatables.net-buttons\js\dataTables.buttons.min.js public\assets\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\datatables.net-buttons-bs4\js\buttons.bootstrap4.min.js public\assets\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\datatables.net-buttons\js\buttons.html5.min.js public\assets\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\datatables.net-buttons\js\buttons.print.min.js public\assets\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\datatables.net-buttons-bs4\css\buttons.bootstrap4.min.css public\assets\css\ && xcopy /y node_modules\jszip\dist\jszip.min.js public\assets\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\pdfmake\build\pdfmake.min.js public\assets\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\pdfmake\build\vfs_fonts.js public\assets\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\chart.js\dist\chart.umd.js public\assets\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\vue\dist\vue.min.js public\assets\js\
scripts.copy-editor-assets: xcopy /e /i /y node_modules\@ckeditor\ckeditor5-build-classic\build public\assets\vendor\admin\ckeditor5-build-classic && xcopy /e /i /y node_modules\codemirror public\assets\vendor\admin\codemirror && xcopy /y node_modules\grapesjs\dist\grapes.min.js public\assets\vendor\admin\grapesjs\js\ && xcopy /y node_modules\grapesjs\dist\css\grapes.min.css public\assets\vendor\admin\grapesjs\css\
